. LTop Grade✨【carryall Handbag】 m13661 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
The CarryAll Hl Lt small handbag features Monogram canvas and leather trim, serving as a companion for urban life. The ample silhouette features a tidy interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
Dimensions: 29 x 24 x 12 cm

items.name_en: (Dynamic Chip Version) Original Enhanced Version
items.name_cn:
(Dynamic Chip Version) Original Enhanced Version
🔝CANOÉ Tote
Model: M83480
Crafted from Monogram canvas, this bag combines the drawstring of the Noé bag with the molded bottom of the Cannes bag, offering both trendy style and practical function. The woven chain and leather shoulder strap are detachable for multiple carrying ways.
Size: 14*20.5*14

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M43986 VANITY Bag. Inspired by the historic LV Cannes vanity case. Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière reimagines the charm of a classic with this semi-rigid bag. Small size. Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas mix. Distinctive Louis Vuitton design. Very elegant. Features a top handle and detachable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying options. Size 15x17x15cm

Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes bags, featuring a drawstring from the former and a molded bottom from the latter, blending trendy style with practicality. items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83566 PM83566 Monogram. This Nano Diane features a Monogram canvas body with leather corners and a traditional buckle, recreating vintage details like the rounded flap and belt-style closure. Spacious enough for a phone and daily essentials, with a detachable handle and adjustable/removable shoulder strap for versatile carrying, suitable for day or night. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
